label: http api • same prompt through /v1/chat/completions and the agents surface answers on both
query: What is 8 plus 5? Answer with just the number.
notes: Parity pin: the same prompt driven through the OpenAI-compatible chat surface and the agents run surface must BOTH produce a non-empty answer satisfying responseContains — catching a routing/config divergence where one surface silently degrades. Off-CI (needs a model).
